turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#f6f2e9"/>

  <!-- Ground -->
  <path d="M0 420 C120 390, 200 430, 280 410 C370 388, 450 420, 512 400 L512 512 L0 512 Z" fill="#d9c7a6"/>

  <!-- Feudal hierarchy: top lord (castle) -->
  <g transform="translate(256 120)">
    <path d="M-70 120 L-70 40 L-45 40 L-45 20 L-22 20 L-22 40 L5 40 L5 20 L28 20 L28 40 L55 40 L55 120 Z" fill="#9b6b3f"/>
    <path d="M-85 120 L85 120" stroke="#7a4f2d" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <!-- Towers -->
    <path d="M-85 120 L-85 65 Q-85 55 -75 55 L-55 55 Q-45 55 -45 65 L-45 120 Z" fill="#8a5a34"/>
    <path d="M45 120 L45 65 Q45 55 55 55 L75 55 Q85 55 85 65 L85 120 Z" fill="#8a5a34"/>

    <!-- Main gate -->
    <path d="M-18 120 V70 Q-18 60 -8 60 H8 Q18 60 18 70 V120 Z" fill="#6f3f22"/>
    <rect x="-10" y="78" width="20" height="18" rx="2" fill="#3b1f11" opacity="0.35"/>

    <!-- Windows -->
    <rect x="-64" y="85" width="18" height="18" rx="3" fill="#2f1a10" opacity="0.25"/>
    <rect x="52" y="85" width="18" height="18" rx="3" fill="#2f1a10" opacity="0.25"/>
    <rect x="-10" y="98" width="20" height="12" rx="3" fill="#2f1a10" opacity="0.18"/>

    <!-- Roof lines -->
    <path d="M-78 65 L-60 35 L-42 65" stroke="#6b3c1f" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M42 65 L60 35 L78 65" stroke="#6b3c1f" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Knight (mid-level vassal) -->
  <g transform="translate(256 285)">
    <!-- Shield / armor body -->
    <path d="M-55 95 Q0 130 55 95 V20 Q55 -10 28 -25 Q0 -38 -28 -25 Q-55 -10 -55 20 Z" fill="#37424f"/>
    <!-- Belt -->
    <rect x="-50" y="35" width="100" height="18" rx="9" fill="#2a313a" opacity="0.9"/>
    <!-- Chest highlight -->
    <path d="M-18 0 Q0 -10 18 0 Q18 55 0 85 Q-18 55 -18 0 Z" fill="#4b5969" opacity="0.55"/>

    <!-- Head -->
    <path d="M-18 0 Q0 -28 18 0 V18 Q0 36 -18 18 Z" fill="#2b333d"/>
    <path d="M-10 6 Q0 -6 10 6 Q10 14 0 22 Q-10 14 -10 6 Z" fill="#121821" opacity="0.35"/>

    <!-- Helmet plume -->
    <path d="M-2 -40 C10 -55 24 -35 14 -15 C6 -2 -10 -10 -2 -40 Z" fill="#b14b3c" opacity="0.85"/>

    <!-- Sword/authority (no text) -->
    <g transform="translate(60 35)">
      <rect x="-8" y="-30" width="16" height="120" rx="6" fill="#2f2f35"/>
      <path d="M-18 -28 L0 -48 L18 -28" fill="#6b6f78"/>
      <rect x="-12" y="-6" width="24" height="18" rx="6" fill="#b89a5a" opacity="0.9"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Arm/holding (connected to shield) -->
    <path d="M-60 55 C-90 35 -100 70 -82 92 C-70 110 -55 95 -52 80" fill="#2f3945"/>

    <!-- Legs -->
    <path d="M-22 90 L-12 165 Q-10 178 2 175 L-2 90 Z" fill="#2a313a"/>
    <path d="M22 90 L12 165 Q10 178 -2 175 L2 90 Z" fill="#2a313a"/>
    <path d="M-18 168 Q-5 190 8 168" fill="#1b212a" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path d="M18 168 Q5 190 -8 168" fill="#1b212a" opacity="0.9"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Peasants (bottom level) -->
  <g transform="translate(256 385)">
    <!-- Left peasant -->
    <g transform="translate(-120 10)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-40" r="18" fill="#6b4a3a"/>
      <path d="M-28 -10 Q0 -35 28 -10 V55 Q28 80 0 80 Q-28 80 -28 55 Z" fill="#7a8b4f"/>
      <path d="M-28 -10 Q0 -35 28 -10 Q20 10 0 8 Q-20 10 -28 -10 Z" fill="#5d7241" opacity="0.85"/>
      <path d="M-22 70 Q-10 90 -2 78 Q4 70 -8 64" fill="#586046"/>
      <path d="M22 70 Q10 90 2 78 Q-4 70 8 64" fill="#586046"/>
      <!-- Farm tool handle -->
      <rect x="34" y="-5" width="8" height="95" rx="4" fill="#8a6b3f" opacity="0.9"/>
      <path d="M-2 -5 L40 18 L14 22 L-2 -5 Z" fill="#7b7f88" opacity="0.45"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Center peasant -->
    <g transform="translate(0 20)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-55" r="16" fill="#6a4636"/>
      <path d="M-25 -25 Q0 -50 25 -25 V70 Q25 95 0 95 Q-25 95 -25 70 Z" fill="#7b6a4b"/>
      <path d="M-25 -25 Q0 -50 25 -25 Q10 -5 0 0 Q-10 -5 -25 -25 Z" fill="#6a5a3e" opacity="0.85"/>
      <path d="M-18 80 Q-6 98 4 82 Q10 73 -4 68" fill="#5b4d36"/>
      <path d="M18 80 Q6 98 -4 82 Q-10 73 4 68" fill="#5b4d36"/>
      <!-- Simple hoe-like head -->
      <rect x="-8" y="-10" width="6" height="85" rx="3" fill="#8a6b3f" opacity="0.95"/>
      <path d="M-8 -10 L18 5 L5 18 L-8 -10 Z" fill="#7a7f88" opacity="0.35"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Right peasant -->
    <g transform="translate(130 10)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-45" r="17" fill="#6d4a3a"/>
      <path d="M-26 -15 Q0 -40 26 -15 V60 Q26 85 0 85 Q-26 85 -26 60 Z" fill="#7a8b4f"/>
      <path d="M-26 -15 Q0 -40 26 -15 Q18 5 0 3 Q-18 5 -26 -15 Z" fill="#5d7241" opacity="0.85"/>
      <!-- Bundle / bag -->
      <path d="M-6 30 Q0 20 6 30 Q12 45 0 55 Q-12 45 -6 30 Z" fill="#b89a5a" opacity="0.55"/>
      <path d="M-20 70 Q-8 92 0 78 Q6 70 -6 64" fill="#586046"/>
      <path d="M20 70 Q8 92 0 78 Q-6 70 6 64" fill="#586046"/>
      <!-- Pitchfork -->
      <rect x="-44" y="-10" width="8" height="100" rx="4" fill="#8a6b3f" opacity="0.92"/>
      <path d="M-48 5 L-62 18 L-42 18 Z" fill="#7a7f88" opacity="0.35"/>
      <path d="M-48 25 L-70 45 L-45 40 Z" fill="#7a7f88" opacity="0.25"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Subtle hierarchical lines (ties/structure) -->
  <g stroke="#7a5a3a" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.25" fill="none">
    <path d="M256 245 C236 290, 220 310, 170 345"/>
    <path d="M256 245 C276 290, 292 312, 345 345"/>
    <path d="M256 245 C256 290, 256 315, 256 360"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Designing feudalism concept**

I need to create a visual representation of feudalism without using any text. I think using icons like a castle for the top, knights in the middle, and peasants at the bottom would work well. A simple feudal pyramid would communicate this clearly: the castle represents the lord, with silhouettes showing knights and peasants, perhaps with elements like farms represented below. I can aim for basic shapes to keep it simple and provide a single SVG file.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
